scripts.bench:wasm: pnpm run bench:wasm:build && pnpm run bench:wasm:opfs
scripts.bench:compare: pnpm run bench:compare:data && pnpm run bench:harness:assets && pnpm run bench:harness:build && node wasm-bench/run-compare.cjs
scripts.bench:compare:open: pnpm run bench:compare:data && pnpm run bench:harness:assets && node wasm-bench/with-wasm-llvm.cjs trunk serve --config wasm-bench/harness/Trunk.toml
